_instructions: Copy this file to brand_config.json and fill in your details. brand_config.json is gitignored — it stays on your machine.

brand.name: Your Brand Name
brand.description: What your brand is about in 1-2 sentences. This is used in AI prompts to keep content on-brand.
brand.niche: Describe your niche in a few words, e.g. 'health and fitness', 'personal finance', 'travel photography', 'software engineering'

voice.tone: e.g. Direct, knowledgeable, slightly irreverent. Not preachy.
voice.personality: e.g. The friend who gives real advice without the fluff.
avoid: List things your brand never says or does
embrace: Specific, actionable information people can use today

color_palette._comment: Used by the content engine for carousel and image generation. Hex codes.

platforms._comment: Set enabled: false for platforms you don't use. Handles are your username without the @.

content_types._comment: Define the content formats that make sense for your niche. engagement_multiplier is relative — 1.0 is baseline. You can add or remove types.

reaction.description: React to something trending in your niche — a product, news story, or viral claim
reaction.example: Hold up a product, flip it over, react to what you find

comparison.description: Compare two things — good vs bad, before vs after, cheap vs expensive
comparison.example: Slide 1: Option A. Slide 2: Why it fails. Slide 3: Better alternative

showcase.description: Show something you made, do, or use in your niche
showcase.example: Quick visual of your work, process, or result

myth_bust.description: Correct a common misconception or piece of bad advice in your niche
myth_bust.example: Start with the myth, explain why it's wrong, give the real answer

tutorial.description: Quick how-to, tip, or skill demo in your niche
tutorial.example: 15-30 second demo of one specific technique or trick

deep_dive.description: Educational carousel or thread on a topic your audience wants to understand
deep_dive.example: 5-8 slide breakdown of a complex concept in your niche

hot_take.description: Strong, specific opinion on a trending topic in your niche
hot_take.example: Disagree with conventional wisdom and explain exactly why

recommendation.description: Genuine recommendation of a product, tool, or resource you actually use
recommendation.example: The three things I use every week and why I chose them

ml._comment: Controls the ML engagement prediction model. Adjust engagement_weights to prioritize what matters most to your business.
